sections.paragraph:
a root unused in Kal, which I believe means, to be dumb, to become dumb, like בָּהַם, an idea which is applied to stupor, as in שָׁמַם, תָּמַהּ. Arab. دهم is to come upon suddenly, pr. to amaze, to confound, دهيم foolish, stupid, دُهَيْمُ sudden calamity, pr. stupifying.

Niphal, participle נִדְהָם amazed, confounded by sudden misfortune. Jer 14:9.
